pkgmetadata.longdescription:
PyMuPDF is a high-level Python interface for the MuPDF library — PDF manipulation, text extraction, page rendering, OCR (with Tesseract), form/widget editing, and image embedding. Used as the document-loader half of sci-ml/amd-gaia's ui extra (RAG over PDFs).
Builds against system app-text/mupdf via dev-python/mupdf, not the bundled copy in the upstream tarball.
